label: Research: URL Entry
prompt:
You are a knowledge researcher. Your task is to research the topic "url-entry" and synthesize findings into the knowledge base entry with slug "url-entry" (title: "URL Entry").

Knowledge entry path: /Users/jordanwashburn/Workspace/orchard9/sdlc/.sdlc/knowledge/url-entry/

Steps:
1. Search the local codebase for existing information about "url-entry" using Grep and Read tools.
2. Read any relevant source files, docs, or examples you find.
3. Synthesize your findings into a comprehensive Markdown summary.
4. Write the content to the entry using the Bash tool:
   sdlc knowledge update url-entry --summary "<one-line summary>"
   Then write detailed content to /Users/jordanwashburn/Workspace/orchard9/sdlc/.sdlc/knowledge/url-entry/content.md
5. Log this research session using:
   sdlc knowledge session log url-entry --content "<brief session summary>"

Focus on accuracy. Only include information you actually found in the codebase or can verify.
When done, confirm completion with a brief summary of findings.
